Package noppes.npcs.api.ability

Interface ICustomAbility

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IAbility, IAbilityAction
    public interface ICustomAbility
extends IAbility
    A custom (script-driven) ability whose behavior is entirely defined by script event hooks. Supports both instant execution mode and toggle mode.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int getDurationTicks()
      Get the duration in ticks for instant mode (non-toggle).
      int getTargetingModeType()
      Get the targeting mode ordinal.
      int getTelegraphActiveTicks()
      Get how many ticks the telegraph persists during the active phase.
      float getTelegraphAngle()
      Get the telegraph angle in degrees (used by CONE shape).
      float getTelegraphInnerRadius()
      Get the telegraph inner radius (used by RING, CONE shapes).
      float getTelegraphLength()
      Get the telegraph length (used by LINE, CONE shapes).
      float getTelegraphRadius()
      Get the telegraph radius (used by CIRCLE, RING, SQUARE shapes).
      int getTelegraphShapeType()
      Get the telegraph shape type ordinal.
      float getTelegraphWidth()
      Get the telegraph width (used by LINE shape).
      boolean isSyncTelegraphWithDuration()
      Whether telegraph active ticks are synced to the ability duration.
      void setDurationTicks​(int ticks)
      Set the duration in ticks for instant mode.
      void setSyncTelegraphWithDuration​(boolean sync)
      Set whether telegraph active ticks should sync to the ability duration.
      void setTargetingModeType​(int type)
      Set the targeting mode by ordinal.
      void setTelegraphActiveTicks​(int ticks)
      Set how many ticks the telegraph persists during the active phase.
      void setTelegraphAngle​(float angle)
      Set the telegraph angle in degrees.
      void setTelegraphInnerRadius​(float innerRadius)
      Set the telegraph inner radius.
      void setTelegraphLength​(float length)
      Set the telegraph length.
      void setTelegraphRadius​(float radius)
      Set the telegraph radius.
      void setTelegraphShapeType​(int type)
      Set the telegraph shape type by ordinal.
      void setTelegraphWidth​(float width)
      Set the telegraph width.

        isChain

    • Method Detail

      • getDurationTicks

        int getDurationTicks()
        Get the duration in ticks for instant mode (non-toggle).
        Returns:
        duration in ticks

      • setDurationTicks

        void setDurationTicks​(int ticks)
        Set the duration in ticks for instant mode.
        Parameters:
        ticks - duration in ticks

      • getTelegraphShapeType

        int getTelegraphShapeType()
        Get the telegraph shape type ordinal.
        Returns:
        ordinal of TelegraphType: 0=CIRCLE, 1=RING, 2=LINE, 3=CONE, 4=POINT, 5=SQUARE, 6=NONE

      • setTelegraphShapeType

        void setTelegraphShapeType​(int type)
        Set the telegraph shape type by ordinal.
        Parameters:
        type - ordinal of TelegraphType

      • getTargetingModeType

        int getTargetingModeType()
        Get the targeting mode ordinal.
        Returns:
        ordinal of TargetingMode: 0=AGGRO_TARGET, 1=SELF, 2=AOE_SELF, 3=AOE_TARGET

      • setTargetingModeType

        void setTargetingModeType​(int type)
        Set the targeting mode by ordinal.
        Parameters:
        type - ordinal of TargetingMode

      • getTelegraphActiveTicks

        int getTelegraphActiveTicks()
        Get how many ticks the telegraph persists during the active phase. When syncTelegraphWithDuration is true, this returns the duration ticks.
        Returns:
        telegraph active ticks

      • setTelegraphActiveTicks

        void setTelegraphActiveTicks​(int ticks)
        Set how many ticks the telegraph persists during the active phase. Only used when syncTelegraphWithDuration is false.
        Parameters:
        ticks - telegraph active ticks

      • isSyncTelegraphWithDuration

        boolean isSyncTelegraphWithDuration()
        Whether telegraph active ticks are synced to the ability duration.
        Returns:
        true if synced

      • setSyncTelegraphWithDuration

        void setSyncTelegraphWithDuration​(boolean sync)
        Set whether telegraph active ticks should sync to the ability duration.
        Parameters:
        sync - whether to sync

      • getTelegraphRadius

        float getTelegraphRadius()
        Get the telegraph radius (used by CIRCLE, RING, SQUARE shapes).
        Returns:
        the telegraph radius

      • setTelegraphRadius

        void setTelegraphRadius​(float radius)
        Set the telegraph radius.
        Parameters:
        radius - the telegraph radius

      • getTelegraphInnerRadius

        float getTelegraphInnerRadius()
        Get the telegraph inner radius (used by RING, CONE shapes).
        Returns:
        the inner radius

      • setTelegraphInnerRadius

        void setTelegraphInnerRadius​(float innerRadius)
        Set the telegraph inner radius.
        Parameters:
        innerRadius - the inner radius

      • getTelegraphLength

        float getTelegraphLength()
        Get the telegraph length (used by LINE, CONE shapes).
        Returns:
        the telegraph length

      • setTelegraphLength

        void setTelegraphLength​(float length)
        Set the telegraph length.
        Parameters:
        length - the telegraph length

      • getTelegraphWidth

        float getTelegraphWidth()
        Get the telegraph width (used by LINE shape).
        Returns:
        the telegraph width

      • setTelegraphWidth

        void setTelegraphWidth​(float width)
        Set the telegraph width.
        Parameters:
        width - the telegraph width

      • getTelegraphAngle

        float getTelegraphAngle()
        Get the telegraph angle in degrees (used by CONE shape).
        Returns:
        the telegraph angle in degrees

      • setTelegraphAngle

        void setTelegraphAngle​(float angle)
        Set the telegraph angle in degrees.
        Parameters:
        angle - the angle in degrees
